title: callicarpa pentandra f. apoensis
intro: Callicarpa pentandra f. apoensis is a plant species commonly known as Apo Purple Fruit or Purple Callicarpa, which belongs to the family Lamiaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine in the Philippines, where its leaves and fruits are valued for their medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Callicarpa pentandra f. apoensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to support immune system function and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the leaves and fruits of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
